unit_tests.note: Shell script changes only - no TypeScript unit tests affected. Existing tests cannot run due to pre-existing worktree environment issue (vitest not resolved in node_modules).

static_analysis.note: ESLint: 0 errors. TypeScript/vitest resolution errors are pre-existing worktree environment issues unrelated to this change. bash -n syntax check passed for all 3 scripts.

commits: 697846a: fix(scripts): harden process stop logic with PID validation and graceful shutdown

stop_sh: Added port number validation with bash [[ =~ ]] pattern matching (1-65535 range)
Changed variable PID to PIDS with validated pipeline (grep -E '^[0-9]+$' | sort -u || true)
Changed kill "$PID" to echo "$PIDS" | xargs kill for multi-PID support
Added SIGTERM -> sleep 2 -> REMAINING check -> SIGKILL fallback
Fixed error message to fixed string (no variable interpolation for security)
stop_server_sh: Added port number validation with bash [[ =~ ]] pattern matching
Step 1: Added PID pipeline validation (grep/sort -u), changed kill -9 to SIGTERM + SIGKILL staged
Step 2: Added PID file validation (head -1 | grep), SIGTERM with process group (kill -- -$PID), SIGKILL fallback, EPERM warning
Step 3 (Final check): Added PID pipeline validation to REMAINING
build_and_start_sh: Added port number validation with bash [[ =~ ]] pattern matching
Added PID file validation (head -1 | grep) with stale file cleanup
Added port-based already-running detection (lsof pipeline with || true for set -e safety)
Added chmod 600 after PID file write for security (matching CLI PidManager 0o600)

design_checklist_compliance.D1_002_pipe_or_true: || true added to all PIDS and REMAINING pipelines
design_checklist_compliance.D1_006_process_group: kill -- -$PID for SIGTERM, kill -9 -$PID || kill -9 $PID for SIGKILL
design_checklist_compliance.S4_003_pid_file_chmod: chmod 600 added after PID file write
design_checklist_compliance.S4_004_eperm_warning: Fixed string WARNING on stderr after SIGKILL failure
design_checklist_compliance.S4_005_fixed_error_messages: All error messages use fixed strings, no $PORT interpolation

message: TDD implementation complete. All 3 shell scripts modified per design policy. bash -n syntax check passed. ESLint 0 errors. Only shell script files changed - zero TypeScript impact. Commit 697846a created.
